name: Improper Neutralization of Server-Side Includes (SSI) Within a Web Page
description: The product does not properly neutralize user input that could be interpreted as Server-Side Include (SSI) directives (<!--#exec, <!--#include) before embedding it in web pages processed by an SSI-enabled server, allowing attackers to execute commands or include arbitrary files.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing SSI directive syntax that flows to STORAGE[web_page] or EGRESS[ssi_enabled_output] without a TRANSFORM[ssi_neutralization] node that strips or encodes SSI comment directives before the page is served by an SSI-enabled web server
